data.title: Is the Options Market Predicting A Spike In First Advantage Stock?
data.description: Investors in First Advantage Corporation (NASDAQ: FA) need to pay close attention to the stock based on moves in the options market lately. That is because the Jan 17, 2025 $15 Put had some of the highest implied volatility of all equity options today.

data.title: What's Going On With Vanguard S&P 500 ETF (VOO) This Week?
data.description: This week, the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF saw a roughly 0.6% gain. VOO, which tracks the S&P 500, serves as a key indicator of the overall U.S. stock market.

data.title: How Is The Market Feeling About KKR?
J.B. Hunt Stock On The Move: Analysts Forecast Big Gains Ahead
data.description: The fear of contraction and analysts' sentiment pressured J.B. Hunt (NASDAQ: JBHT) stock to a long-term low earlier this year, but a shift signals the opposite for 2025.

data.title: This Small-Cap Nuclear Stock Is Up Over 100% In A Month: Will It Keep Generating Momentum?
data.description: NuScale Power Corp (NYSE:SMR) stock has surged 102.62% in a month due to its US SMR design license and bullish signals, but challenges remain.
